com.hp.workpath.api.accessory.hid

Class AccessoryService

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.accessory.hid.AccessoryService

  • public class AccessoryService
extends java.lang.Object

    AccessoryService provides interfaces for handling accessories on a device. Accessory can be of following types :-

    • Generic ccid accessory.
    • Generic HID accessory.
    • Generic mass storage accessory.
      • The accessories can be registered as following types :-
    • Owned Accessories.
    • Shared Accessories.
    Implementation of AccessoryService allow to get list of owned and shared accessories, enumerate accessories, resend OwnedAccessory context, reserve SharedAccessory, open & close accessories, start & stop reading accessories and read and write reports.

    Since:
    API 3

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static class  AccessoryService.AbstractAccessoryObserver
      AbstractAccessoryObserver provides a mechanism to monitor the state of the AccessoryService operations.
      static class  AccessoryService.AbstractAccessoryStartObserver
      AbstractAccessoryStartObserver provides a mechanism to monitor the ready state of the AccessoryService operations.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static void close(android.content.Context context, java.lang.String accessoryContextId, Result result)
      Requests to close accessory with accessory context id.
      static java.util.List<AccessoryInfo> enumerateAccessories(android.content.Context context, Result result)
      Retrieves the list of accessories registered as owned or shared and attached to the device.
      static HIDInfo getInfo(android.content.Context context, java.lang.String accessoryContextId, Result result)
      Returns detailed, HID-specific information about an individual HID accessory.
      static java.util.List<AccessoryInfo> getOwnedAccessories(android.content.Context context, Result result)
      Retrieves the list of accessories registered as owned by the application.
      static boolean isReady(android.content.Context context)
      This method is needed to determine if accessories service is ready or not.
      static boolean isSupported(android.content.Context context)
      This method is needed to determine if the service is supported or not.
      static void open(android.content.Context context, java.lang.String accessoryContextId, Result result)
      Requests to open accessory with accessory context id.
      static HIDReport readReport(android.content.Context context, java.lang.String accessoryContextId, HIDReportType hidReportType, Result result)
      Synchronously reads an input or feature report from the accessory.
      static void releaseSharedAccessory(android.content.Context context, java.lang.String accessoryContextId, Result result)
      Requests to release shared accessory with accessory context id.
      static void resendOwnedAccessoryContext(android.content.Context context, AccessoryInfo accessoryInfo, Result result)
      Forces resending of accessory context AccessoryService.AbstractAccessoryObserver.onContextChange(AccessoryInfo, EventCode, String, String).
      static java.lang.String reserveSharedAccessory(android.content.Context context, AccessoryInfo accessoryInfo, Result result)
      Requests to reserve shared accessory and create new context ID of the accessory.
      static void startReading(android.content.Context context, java.lang.String accessoryContextId, Result result)
      Signals the device to start processing reads from the accessory.
      static void stopReading(android.content.Context context, java.lang.String accessoryContextId, Result result)
      Signals the device to stop processing reads from the accessory.
      static void writeReport(android.content.Context context, java.lang.String accessoryContextId, HIDReport hidReport, Result result)
      Synchronously writes a report to the accessory.

    • Method Detail

      • getOwnedAccessories

        public static java.util.List<AccessoryInfo> getOwnedAccessories(android.content.Context context,
                                                                Result result)

        Retrieves the list of accessories registered as owned by the application.

        Parameters:
        context - The Context object for your activity or application.
        result - (optional) Indicates any errors occurred while getting owned accessories.
        Returns:

        list of AccessoryInfo.

        • Return value can be empty and if empty it returns empty list. Otherwise list of AccessoryInfo.

        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - Returns error if calling a method on a null reference(context) or trying to access a field of a null reference will trigger a NullPointerException.
        Since:
        API 3

      • enumerateAccessories

        public static java.util.List<AccessoryInfo> enumerateAccessories(android.content.Context context,
                                                                 Result result)

        Retrieves the list of accessories registered as owned or shared and attached to the device.

        Parameters:
        context - The Context object for your activity or application.
        result - (optional) Indicates any errors occurred while registering.
        Returns:
        list of AccessoryInfo.
        • Return value can be empty and if empty it returns empty list. Otherwise list of AccessoryInfo.

        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - Returns error if calling a method on a null reference(context) or trying to access a field of a null reference will trigger a NullPointerException.
        Since:
        API 3

      • resendOwnedAccessoryContext

        public static void resendOwnedAccessoryContext(android.content.Context context,
                                               AccessoryInfo accessoryInfo,
                                               Result result)

        Forces resending of accessory context AccessoryService.AbstractAccessoryObserver.onContextChange(AccessoryInfo, EventCode, String, String).

        Parameters:
        context - The Context object for your activity or application.
        accessoryInfo - AccessoryInfo to request resending context.
        result - (optional) Indicates any errors occurred while getting owned accessory context.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - Returns error if calling a method on a null reference(context) or trying to access a field of a null reference will trigger a NullPointerException.
        Since:
        API 3

      • reserveSharedAccessory

        public static java.lang.String reserveSharedAccessory(android.content.Context context,
                                                      AccessoryInfo accessoryInfo,
                                                      Result result)

        Requests to reserve shared accessory and create new context ID of the accessory.

        Parameters:
        context - The Context object for your activity or application.
        accessoryInfo - AccessoryInfo to register.
        result - (optional) Indicates any errors occurred while reserving.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - Returns error if context or accessoryId is null or trying to access a field of a null reference will trigger a NullPointerException.
        Since:
        API 3

      • releaseSharedAccessory

        public static void releaseSharedAccessory(android.content.Context context,
                                          java.lang.String accessoryContextId,
                                          Result result)

        Requests to release shared accessory with accessory context id.

        Parameters:
        context - The Context object for your activity or application.
        accessoryContextId - accessory context id to release.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - Returns error if context or accessoryId is null or trying to access a field of a null reference will trigger a NullPointerException.
        Since:
        API 3

      • open

        public static void open(android.content.Context context,
                        java.lang.String accessoryContextId,
                        Result result)

        Requests to open accessory with accessory context id.

        Parameters:
        context - The Context object for your activity or application.
        accessoryContextId - accessory context id to open.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - Returns error if context or accessoryId is null or trying to access a field of a null reference will trigger a NullPointerException.
        Since:
        API 3

      • getInfo

        public static HIDInfo getInfo(android.content.Context context,
                              java.lang.String accessoryContextId,
                              Result result)

        Returns detailed, HID-specific information about an individual HID accessory.

        Parameters:
        context - The Context object for your activity or application.
        accessoryContextId - accessory context id to get detail.
        result - (optional) Indicates any errors occurred while retrieving accessory.
        Returns:
        Accessory HIDInfo.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - Returns error if calling a method on a null reference(context) or trying to access a field of a null reference will trigger a NullPointerException.
        Since:
        API 3

      • close

        public static void close(android.content.Context context,
                         java.lang.String accessoryContextId,
                         Result result)

        Requests to close accessory with accessory context id.

        Parameters:
        context - The Context object for your activity or application.
        accessoryContextId - accessory context id to close.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - Returns error if context or accessoryContextId is null or trying to access a field of a null reference will trigger a NullPointerException.
        Since:
        API 3

      • startReading

        public static void startReading(android.content.Context context,
                                java.lang.String accessoryContextId,
                                Result result)

        Signals the device to start processing reads from the accessory.

        Parameters:
        context - The Context object for your activity or application.
        accessoryContextId - accessory context id to start reading.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - Returns error if context or accessoryContextId is null or trying to access a field of a null reference will trigger a NullPointerException.
        Since:
        API 3

      • stopReading

        public static void stopReading(android.content.Context context,
                               java.lang.String accessoryContextId,
                               Result result)

        Signals the device to stop processing reads from the accessory.

        Parameters:
        context - The Context object for your activity or application.
        accessoryContextId - accessory context id to stop reading.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - Returns error if context or accessoryContextId is null or trying to access a field of a null reference will trigger a NullPointerException.
        Since:
        API 3

      • readReport

        public static HIDReport readReport(android.content.Context context,
                                   java.lang.String accessoryContextId,
                                   HIDReportType hidReportType,
                                   Result result)

        Synchronously reads an input or feature report from the accessory.

        Parameters:
        context - The Context object for your activity or application.
        accessoryContextId - accessory context id to start reading.
        hidReportType - report type to read HIDReportType.
        result - (optional) Indicates any errors occurred while registering.
        Returns:
        HID report HIDReport.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - Returns error if context or accessoryContextId or hidReportType is null or trying to access a field of a null reference will trigger a NullPointerException.
        Since:
        API 3

      • writeReport

        public static void writeReport(android.content.Context context,
                               java.lang.String accessoryContextId,
                               HIDReport hidReport,
                               Result result)

        Synchronously writes a report to the accessory.

        Parameters:
        context - The Context object for your activity or application.
        accessoryContextId - accessory context id to write.
        hidReport - report to write HIDReport.
        result - (optional) Indicates any errors occurred while registering.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - Returns error if context or accessoryContextId or hidReport data is null or trying to access a field of a null reference will trigger a NullPointerException.
        Since:
        API 3

      • isSupported

        public static boolean isSupported(android.content.Context context)

        This method is needed to determine if the service is supported or not. If it's not supported, HID AccessoryService operation will be failed.

        Parameters:
        context - The Context in which the application is running.
        Returns:
        boolean Returns result of supported. If service is supported, method returns true. Otherwise method returns false.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - Returns error if calling a method on a null reference(context) or trying to access a field of a null reference will trigger a NullPointerException.
        Since:
        API 3

      • isReady

        public static boolean isReady(android.content.Context context)

        This method is needed to determine if accessories service is ready or not.

        Parameters:
        context - The Context in which the application is running.
        Returns:
        boolean If service is ready, method returns true. Otherwise method returns false.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - Returns error if calling a method on a null reference(context) or trying to access a field of a null reference will trigger a NullPointerException.
        Since:
        API 5
